title: SEALAPACK® FISH FLAVOUR LOCK BAGS, PACK OF 10
features: HEALTHY COOKING: Sealapack Bags, perfect for all types of fish, keep the flavour lcoked in during cooking. Cook each type of fish at the same time in different bags, simple fuss free cooking
FLAVOUR LOCK: Retain moisture and flavour. Add your preferred marinade, herbs, spices or sauce to the bag with your favourite fish and cook, serve tasty fish with ease
CLEAN COOKING: After cooking, carefully open the bag, serve the contents and dispose of the bag in household waste bin. No washing up !
READY TO USE: Quick and easy cooking with the ready to use bag, simply choose your fish and other ingredients and cook
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 10 BAGS
description: Sealapack Bags, perfect for all types of fish, keep the flavour locked in during cooking. Cook each type of fish at the same time in different bags, simple fuss free cooking. Retain moisture and flavour. Add your preferred marinade, herbs, spices or sauce to the bag with your favourite fish and cook, serve tasty fish with ease.
